content:
The TB mobile app doesn't currently support any calender functionality or plugins.

The feature has been highly requested by the community. You can vote for this via the Mozilla connect link below.

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/calendar-support-on-thunderbird-mobile/idi-p/76394

The Thunderbird team have stated on their state of the Thunder blog:

"For calendar explorations, we’ll determine whether it’s better to integrate with the native Android calendar or build a calendar section for the app."
creator: platform34
